entity.summary: Electroneum Smart Chain decentralized exchange providing token swaps, liquidity provision, pool-based trading, and wallet-connected DeFi access.
entity.notes: Current first-party ElectroSwap website identifies the protocol as decentralized trading infrastructure for Electroneum, documents swap and liquidity features, and links the live application and documentation. HEI consolidates the version-labelled ElectroSwap V3 candidate under one entity.

evidence.title: ElectroSwap official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website describes decentralized trading on Electroneum Smart Chain and documents swap, liquidity, transparency, and exchange application features.

evidence.title: ElectroSwap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party JavaScript application endpoint remains reachable and is linked from the official ElectroSwap website.

evidence.title: ElectroSwap V3 exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies the version-labelled ElectroSwap exchange surface; HEI consolidates it under the ElectroSwap entity.
